expectations.text: Uses NESTED iteration: outer over months, inner over days
Inner finds MAX daily Gross Sales within a month
Outer AVERAGEs the per-month peaks across months
Context transition re-evaluates [Gross Sales] at day grain in inner iterator
expectations.evidence: [Gross Sales] measure ref transitions per day inside MAXX

expectations.text: Builds on [Gross Sales]; only existing columns

expectations.evidence: clean structure. (Caveat: correct only at month-grain cells; at a year/total the inner VALUES('Date'[Date]) is not month-scoped -- shared by both configs)
